description_long: This is a female adult with a fit build, standing with arms outstretched in a T-pose. She is dressed in tactical attire, featuring a minimal bikini-style top and shorts, with torn tights and combat boots. Her outfit is accessorized with a utility harness, pouches, and a thigh holster, suggesting a military or mercenary role. She has a full sleeve tattoo on her left arm and wears fingerless gloves, with her right arm covered by a long glove. Her hair is styled in a side-swept, partially braided look, and her expression is neutral. The overall appearance is rugged and prepared for urban or combat scenarios.
description: A fit adult woman in tactical, revealing combat attire with utility gear, tattoos, and a side-swept braided hairstyle, standing in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical bikini top, utility harness, pouches, torn tights, boots, and full sleeve tattoo on the left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the utility pouches, holster, and the side-swept hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the harness straps, back pouches, and the full extent of the torn tights and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the long glove on the right arm, holster, and the braided detail of the hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical bikini top and shorts with torn tights, utility harness, fingerless gloves, and combat accessories
attribute_hairstyle: long side-swept hair with partial braids
